ddls:
CREATE TABLE "motion_data" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "time_stamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the data capture */,
  "accel" TEXT /* Acceleration data (x;y;z) from the sensor */,
  "gyro" TEXT /* Gyroscope data (x;y;z) from the sensor */,
  "head" TEXT /* Position and orientation data (x;y;z) for the head */,
  "hand_left" TEXT /* Position and orientation data (x;y;z) for the left hand */,
  "wrist_left" TEXT /* Position and orientation data (x;y;z) for the left wrist */,
  "elbow_left" TEXT /* Position and orientation data (x;y;z) for the left elbow */,
  "shoulder_left" TEXT /* Position and orientation data (x;y;z) for the left shoulder */,
  "spine_shoulder" TEXT /* Position and orientation data (x;y;z) for the spine shoulder */,
  "spine_base" TEXT /* Position and orientation data (x;y;z) for the spine base */,
  "trimming_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trimming segment to which the record belongs */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the record */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Session ID associated with the record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Sensor ID used for data collection */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity being recorded */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the data capture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_trimming_id FOREIGN KEY ("trimming_id") REFERENCES trimming_segments ("trimming_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_motion_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trimming_segments" (
  "trimming_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trimming segment */,
  "start_time" INTEGER /* Start time of the trimming segment */,
  "end_time" INTEGER /* End time of the trimming segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the trimming segment */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the trimming segment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the trimming segment was created */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Session ID associated with the trimming segment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID associated with the trimming segment */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the trimming segment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the trimming segment */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the trimming segment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trimming_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trimming_segments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
